name: Regulatory Practice
summary: Root skill for regulatory compliance, government relations, and administrative law matters.
content:
# Regulatory Practice

This is the parent category for all regulatory skills. Regulatory work involves compliance with government rules, agency interactions, and administrative proceedings.

## Sub-areas
- Financial Services Regulation
- Healthcare Law
- Environmental Law
- FDA & Food/Drug Law
- Data Privacy & Cybersecurity
- Energy Law
- Government Contracts
- International Trade & Customs
- Securities Compliance

## Key Principles
- Deep understanding of regulatory frameworks
- Proactive compliance programs
- Agency relationship management
- Risk assessment and mitigation
- Documentation and record-keeping
